mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER (MBR_ID, MBR_PW, MBR_NM, MBR_ROLE, MBR_TYPE, INST_TYPE, LOGIN_TYPE, BIZ_NO, BIZ_FILE_PATH, MANAGER_NM, MANAGER_POS, PHONE, EMAIL, IS_DONOR, JOIN_DT, WITHDRAW_YN) VALUES (#{mbrId}, #{mbrPw}, #{instNm}, 'USER', 'CORP', #{instType}, 'GENERAL', #{bizNo}, #{bizFilePath}, #{mgrNm}, #{mgrPos}, #{phone}, #{email}, 'N', NOW(), 'N')
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, PROFILE_IMG = #{profileImg}, BIRTH_YEAR = #{birthYear}, GENDER = #{gender}, REGION1 = #{region1}, REGION2 = #{region2} WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq}
UPDATE TB_MEMBER SET WITHDRAW_YN = 'Y', WITHDRAW_DT = NOW() WHERE MBR_SEQ = #{mbrSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_MEMBER WHERE MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND WITHDRAW_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER (MBR_ID, MBR_PW, MBR_NM, MBR_ROLE, MBR_TYPE, LOGIN_TYPE, EMAIL, JOIN_DT, WITHDRAW_YN) VALUES (#{mbrId}, #{mbrPw}, #{mbrNm}, 'USER', 'INDIVIDUAL', 'KAKAO', #{email}, NOW(), 'N')
